tasks.subject: TODO-01: Project skeleton - directories, requirements.txt, .gitignore, .env, README.md
tasks.description: Create complete directory tree per tech-plan.md §2.3, requirements.txt with all v2.0 deps, .gitignore, .env template, core/__init__.py, README.md

tasks.subject: TODO-02: Config system - settings.template.toml, settings.toml, config.py
tasks.description: Create TOML config with 4 sections (data/factor/backtest/risk), implement Config.from_toml() with dataclass defaults

tasks.subject: TODO-03: Logging system - structlog dual output
tasks.description: Implement core/logger.py with JSON file + console output, RotatingFileHandler

tasks.subject: TODO-04: DataLoader framework + trade calendar download
tasks.description: Create DataLoader class skeleton with 13 method signatures, implement download_trade_cal() and load_trade_cal()

tasks.subject: TODO-05: Tushare core data download (stock list, daily, basic, fina)
tasks.description: Implement 4 download methods with rate limiting, error recovery, Hive partitioning

tasks.description: Implement download_sw_classification(), download_index_daily(), download_pledge_stat()

tasks.description: Implement download_baostock_daily() and validate_cross_source() with field mapping and correlation check

tasks.subject: TODO-08: Data loading with adjusted price calculation
tasks.description: Implement load_daily() with DuckDB, download_adj_factor() with 2-batch split, dynamic adj price calculation. Performance < 2s.

tasks.subject: TODO-09: Data quality validation system (13 checks)
tasks.description: Implement validate() with 13 private _check_*() methods covering all validation items from tech-plan.md §3.4 + §5.8

tasks.subject: TODO-10: Incremental update, CLI entry, and unit tests
tasks.description: Implement update_daily(), CLI (--download-all/--update/--validate), test_config.py (3+ tests), test_data_loader.py (6+ tests)

tasks.subject: Evaluate deviation 1: fina_indicator per-stock limitation
tasks.description: Investigate if fina_indicator can be queried in bulk, check Tushare API docs for alternatives

tasks.subject: Evaluate deviation 2: v2.0 fields not in fina_indicator
tasks.description: Check which Tushare APIs provide goodwill, total_equity, audit_opinion and the cost of adding them

tasks.subject: Evaluate deviation 3: SW classification only 3000 stocks
tasks.description: Verify actual SW classification coverage, check alternative approaches, trace impact on factor computation

tasks.subject: Evaluate deviation 4: pledge_stat missing ctrl_pledge_ratio
tasks.description: Check if ctrl_pledge_ratio is available via another Tushare endpoint

tasks.subject: Fix 1: SW classification data corruption (CRITICAL)
tasks.description: Rewrite download_sw_classification() to use l1_name from API response, not loop variable. Deduplicate by ts_code, keep latest in_date.

tasks.subject: Fix 2: Add balancesheet + fina_audit download methods (CRITICAL)
tasks.description: Add download_balancesheet() and download_fina_audit() methods to provide goodwill, total_equity, audit_opinion fields for Universe Layers 7-9

tasks.subject: Fix 3: Remove fina_indicator inner quarterly loop
tasks.description: Remove inner for q in quarters loop. Call fina_indicator once per stock (returns all quarters). Reduces from 21h to ~29min.

tasks.subject: Fix 4: Fix pledge_stat logging + adapt to single field
tasks.description: Add proper logging instead of silent exception swallowing. Document ctrl_pledge_ratio unavailability. Adapt Universe Layer 10 to single-field filter.

tasks.subject: Fix 5: CLI help improvements + doc updates
tasks.description: Add prominent download reminder to CLI help. Update docstrings and comments about API constraints.

tasks.subject: Apply all 6 cross-validation audit fixes
tasks.description: Apply F1-F6 fixes to data_loader.py: rate limiting pauses, daily_basic retry, fina check_9 structure fix, BaoStock rename fix, warning_dates population
